visualGoal: Make an Elite pilot see their own loop in the rig — FA-off combat pilots want the two-stick HOSAS, explorers want the throttle, and everyone now needs a gamepad on the desk for Operations on-foot fights. Real controller product proof throughout; no procedural art. Every embedded image is a verified in-house product photo.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: The main licensed Xbox flight stick — the ONLY console option and a real buyer need for this article. A verified image EXISTS in the flight bay (/images/gear/flight/turtle-beach-velocityone-flight-stick.jpg) but NOT at the space-bay path, so it is text-only here per the hard image rule. Source a space-bay copy (or clear cross-bay reuse) to promote it to a gearpick/shotgrid and remove the Xbox-section visual gap.

Popular Elite exploration HOTAS (real dual-lever throttle, wall of switches). No in-house image and no product record in space.json; stock intermittent through 2026. Text-only, no hard price quoted. Source a photo + add a product record if it stays a headline exploration pick.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic Elite Dangerous home cockpit at night lit in cockpit-cyan and amber, a rigid desk with an empty clamp-mount plate left open on the left AND right for real dual-stick product overlays, a gamepad resting on the desk edge in reach, a monitor showing a generic star-field cockpit HUD (no real game UI, no logos), curator Val Chen seated mid-decision, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake game UI, real Elite Dangerous HUD, warped sticks, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult space-sim curator Val Chen in a clean home cockpit bay, one hand on a mounted flight stick with a second mount visible beside it, thoughtful command-station energy, product overlay space to one side, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.need: Generic Elite-style cockpit / on-foot Operations context shot
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Optional supporting visual for the Operations section. Must be royalty-clear or first-party press media — do NOT scrape in-game screenshots without rights. Article stands without it; all required proof is real product photos.

openQuestions: Operations scope: does zero-G / megaship-interior content actually ship, or is it squad missions + cooperative on-foot combat + the Nomad SLV only? Wiki and news write-ups conflict; body hedges to 'Frontier's pitch / check current patch notes'.
Operations exact release date: 30 June 2026 (wiki) vs July 1 2026 (Simulation Daily)? Body says 'late June 2026'.
Promote Turtle Beach to a visual by sourcing a space-bay copy, or is cross-bay reuse of the verified flight-bay image acceptable in the render?
Keep Logitech X56 as a headline exploration pick (then source a photo + product record) or demote it to a passing mention?
